theme: Compute target values from 1 with fewest operations
title: Batch Power Precompute on Shared Rails
strategies: union of per-target binary chains, reusing already-computed registers
recursive largest-difference construction with register reuse
joint (vectorial) addition-chain search: Bos-Coster-style largest-two reduction (subtract / halve / approximate-GCD) that inverts the op count into a shared build DAG over all targets
